summary: Frontend testing of Admin Dashboard glassmorphism redesign and CSV integration. Fixed critical Analytics tab crash bug. All 4 tabs working correctly with glassmorphism styling in both light and dark mode.

fixed_bugs.issue: TypeError: Cannot convert undefined or null to object at Object.entries when pageviews.daily_views or pageviews.page_breakdown is undefined
fixed_bugs.fix: Added null checks before Object.entries() calls and added empty state messages
fixed_bugs.priority: CRITICAL - was crashing the entire tab

critical_code_review_comments: Glassmorphism CSS classes correctly implemented: bg-white/60 dark:bg-white/[0.04] backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40 dark:border-white/[0.08]
All 4 tabs (Overzicht, CSV Leads, Berichten, Analytics) accessible from admin dashboard
CSV import functionality integrated into admin dashboard and working correctly
Dark mode support properly implemented with dark: variants
Fixed: Analytics tab was crashing due to missing null checks on pageviews.daily_views and pageviews.page_breakdown
seed_data_creation: Used test CSV at /tmp/test_leads.csv with 10 rows (3 with websites filtered out, 7 imported)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 34: Tested Admin Dashboard glassmorphism redesign. Key findings: 1) Login page has glassmorphism card with backdrop-blur-xl and semi-transparent bg, 2) Dashboard has 4 tabs: Overzicht, CSV Leads, Berichten, Analytics, 3) All stat cards (Pageviews, Bezoekers, Berichten, Ongelezen) have glassmorphism styling, 4) CSV Leads tab integrated into admin dashboard with import button, table, search, status filter, 5) CSV import correctly filters out businesses WITH websites, 6) WhatsApp button generates correct wa.me link with 31 prefix, 7) Berichten tab shows contact cards with glassmorphism, 8) Analytics tab was crashing due to null pageviews.daily_views - FIXED by adding null checks, 9) Dark mode works correctly on all tabs. Key data-testids: admin-login-card, admin-password, admin-login-btn, stat-pageviews, stat-bezoekers, stat-berichten, stat-ongelezen, tab-overview, tab-csv, tab-contacts, tab-analytics, csv-import-button, csv-file-input, csv-search-input, csv-status-filter, csv-stat-0 to csv-stat-3, csv-leads-table.
rca_of_the_issue: Analytics tab crash: The code used Object.entries(pageviews.daily_views) without checking if daily_views exists. When the API returns pageviews object without daily_views property (or with null), Object.entries throws TypeError. Fixed by adding conditional checks: pageviews.daily_views && Object.keys(pageviews.daily_views).length > 0
